title: Tsin #6790
definition:
Zin = "flat"

 1) name given to a portion of the desert tract between the Dead Sea
    and Arabah on the east in which Kadesh-barnea was located
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zin = "flat"

 1) name given to a portion of the desert tract between the Dead Sea
    and Arabah on the east in which Kadesh-barnea was located

    NASB:  a desert area which included Kadesh-barnea
